---
name: Suggest a Case Study
about: Know of a Tribal Nation doing meaningful work on data sovereignty or cloud infrastructure? Tell us about it.
title: "[CASE STUDY] "
labels: case-study
assignees: ''
---

## Tribal Nation or Organization

**Name:**

**Region/State:**

---

## What are they doing?

Describe the initiative, project, or policy in as much detail as you can.


---

## Why is it relevant to this playbook?

How does it relate to data sovereignty, cloud infrastructure, Indigenous data governance, or related topics?


---

## Public sources

List any published articles, press releases, official tribal documents, or other sources we can reference. We will not include a case study based solely on unverified information.


---

## Do you have a contact at this nation or organization?

(Optional — only share if you have permission to do so)


---

*We will not publish a case study about a Tribal Nation without sourcing it from that nation's own materials or direct consultation.*
